item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct, explicitly refused to decide for the user, and structured the costs across budget, speed, and reputation/experience.
